name: Double Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package flavored pudding for pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pie filling and milk in a saucepan.
2. Add the butter and chocolate to the mixture.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil.
4. Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes, stirring twice.
5. Pour into the cooled shell and chill for 3 hours.
6. Garnish with whipped topping and chocolate curls if desired.
7. Plastic wrap may be placed on the surface of the pie filling before chilling.
